callGraph.callee:
fetch("/api/connect/profile-pictures")
      .then(r => r.ok ? r.json() : null)
      .then((data: { igPicture?: string | null } | null) => { if (data?.igPicture) setIgPicture(data.igPicture); })
      .catch
